category.name: zoo.window.shopResourceInfo
category.item: Water
Your animals need refreshment! Make them happy with cool water!
Grass
There's no better way to satisfy a hungry stomach than to feed yourself with delicious green grass. And with a little luck, there will be some insects in the grass as a bonus :-) Yummy!
Meat
Who wouldn't enjoy a good piece of meat? Such a juicy steak is a real treat!
Fish
Fish is healthy! And a favorite food for many animals. You don't have to worry about gutting or cutting, your animals will enjoy everything!
Fruit
Sweet juicy fruit - who could resist. Here you will find fruit for all animals!
Grain
Grain is an important source of food for your animals, helping them stay active and healthy!
Medicine
Is one of your animals feeling unwell? This medicine will surely get them back on their feet.
Superfood
With superfood you get double the BZ.
Supermedicine

In case of a severe infection, you need to use a really effective medicine. I'm here quickly with a super medicine. In addition, with super medicines you increase your chance of getting valuable rewards that "jump" out of the enclosure.
The best food
The best feed will give you four times as many paws to beautify your enclosures.
Essence of Tolija
Tolija essence shortens the breeding time by 50%.
Growth potion
With the growth potion, your little ones will grow twice as fast!
Trash
It's amazing what people throw away! Recycle the waste and use the materials to build new items for your zoo.
Super filter
If you recycle waste using a super filter, you will increase your chance of obtaining rare materials.
Booster for craftsman
This hops and energy drink blend is exactly what your craftsmen need to get their energy up and get the job done faster.
Algae
Green aquatic plants full of valuable nutrients! Yummy!
Plankton
Plankton are microorganisms that are food for many ocean animals.
Shrimp
Not only humans, but also animals love shrimp!
Mussels
Savor the soft meat hidden inside. Who could resist such a delicacy?
Water filter
Use a good filter to keep the water in your tanks crystal clear.
Super fish food
Super Fish Food provides a balanced diet for marine life of all shapes and sizes. Serve it up and get a double dose of BZ!
Exclusive fish food
Exclusive food for exclusive fish. Feed your animals this food and get twice as many pearls!
